name: folio_master_build_directive

known_identity.name: Mario A. Espindola
known_identity.summary: Senior HR Professional — 10+ years CA public sector, MPA, experienced in recruitment, labor relations, compliance, benefits, fiscal management, union negotiations

systems.frontend_dashboard: React + Vite + Tailwind on Netlify — standalone, NOT the portfolio

hard_rules: NEVER invent, infer, or fabricate any factual career data.
NEVER write to Supabase before inventory is user-approved.
NEVER expose SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in frontend or function code.
ALWAYS keep the database portable and exportable.
ALWAYS store source_reference and confidence_status on every row.
ALWAYS require human approval at every critical gate.
The dashboard is standalone — do NOT modify the electronic portfolio.
Stop and ask before any destructive or irreversible action.
